queries.question: List the program types that are common to all radio stations.
queries.sql: SELECT Programs.programType  from Radio_Stations_Programs join Programs on Radio_Stations_Programs.programId = Programs.id join Radio_Stations on Radio_Stations_Programs.radioStationId = Radio_Stations.id   GROUP BY Radio_Stations_Programs.programId HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Radio_Stations_Programs.radioStationId) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Radio_Stations)

queries.question: List the radio stations and their program types.
queries.sql: select radio_stations.stationname , programs.programtype from Radio_Stations_Programs join Programs on Radio_Stations_Programs.programId = Programs.id join Radio_Stations on Radio_Stations_Programs.radioStationId = Radio_Stations.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?stationname ?programtype WHERE {
  ?radio_stations_programs a :Radio_Stations_Programs .
  ?programs a :Programs .
  ?radio_stations_programs p:hasPrograms ?programs .
  ?radio_stations a :Radio_Stations .
  ?radio_stations_programs p:hasRadio_Stations ?radio_stations .
  ?radio_stations p:stationName ?stationname .
  ?programs p:programType ?programtype .
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: List the program types aired on each radio station.
